title: Python impl: Yggdrasil address as primary
description: Implement native Yggdrasil addressing in Python and the simulator from spec rule-set v2: current AddrForKey, key-derived link-local IID, no baseline ULA, full-/128 local routing, collision handling, and canonical address/SCHC vectors. Simulate non-local destinations as unreachable pending project-LICHEN-zt3c.2.
